blog_articles.title: Summer Lawn Watering Schedule: How Often to Water in Hot Weather
blog_articles.excerpt: Learn how often and how long to water your lawn in the summer to keep it green without wasting water.
blog_articles.content:
During the hottest months, most established lawns need about 1 to 1.5 inches of water per week, including rainfall. In many climates, this means watering deeply 2–3 times per week instead of a light sprinkle every day. Deep, less frequent watering encourages deep root growth and makes turf more resilient to heat and drought.

A good rule of thumb is to water early in the morning between 4–10 AM, when evaporation is lower and winds are calmer. Avoid evening watering whenever possible, as grass blades that stay wet overnight are more prone to fungal diseases.

To build a summer lawn watering schedule:
- Use a rain gauge or small straight-sided container to measure how much water your sprinklers deliver in 15 minutes.
- Adjust run times so that each zone reaches 0.5–0.75 inches per cycle.
- Plan two cycles per week for most cool-season grasses; three shorter cycles during extreme heat waves.
- Always follow local watering restrictions and drought rules.

If you notice runoff or puddling before you reach your target, break watering into multiple shorter cycles with 30–60 minutes between them to allow water to soak in.

For more region-specific guidance, check our local watering charts or request a lawn health assessment from our team.

services.name: Lawn Mowing
services.shortDescription: Recurring mowing and edging for healthy, tidy turf.
services.longDescription: Our lawn mowing service includes mowing all accessible turf areas, trimming along fences and obstacles, edging along sidewalks and driveways, and blowing clippings off hard surfaces. Choose from weekly, biweekly, or one-time visits based on your yard’s needs.

services.name: Hedge Trimming
services.shortDescription: Shaping and trimming hedges and shrubs by the linear foot.
services.longDescription: We trim and shape hedges, shrubs, and small ornamental trees to maintain clean lines and healthy growth. Pricing is based on total linear feet and average height. Debris can be neatly piled on-site or removed with an add-on.

services.name: Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Eco-friendly, pet-safe pest control for lawns and outdoor spaces.
services.longDescription: Our licensed technicians provide targeted outdoor pest treatments focused on ants, spiders, ticks, and other common yard pests. Choose from eco-friendly and pet-safe formulas, with options for one-time visits or recurring protection plans.

services.name: One-Time Yard Cleanup
services.shortDescription: One-time cleanup for overgrown or messy yards, with optional debris removal.
services.longDescription: Perfect for pre-party spruce-ups, move-ins, or seasonal cleanups. Service may include leaf and debris collection, light pruning, trash pick-up, and lawn edging, based on your property’s needs and chosen package level.

services.name: Front-Yard Redesign
services.shortDescription: Design and installation to refresh your front yard and boost curb appeal.
services.longDescription: Work with our designer to create a custom front-yard plan featuring plant selections, layout, and hardscape recommendations. We specialize in drought-tolerant and low-maintenance designs and can handle both design and installation.

services.name: Drip Irrigation Installation
services.shortDescription: Water-efficient drip irrigation systems for beds and planters.
services.longDescription: We design and install drip irrigation networks tailored to your planting beds and foundation landscaping. Systems can tie into existing spigots or irrigation controllers and are designed to reduce water waste and runoff.

services.name: Patio Power Washing
services.shortDescription: High-pressure washing for patios, walkways, and driveways.
services.longDescription: Remove built-up grime, mildew, and stains from concrete, pavers, and stone surfaces. Ideal before outdoor gatherings or as part of seasonal cleanups.

services.name: Leaf Blowing
services.shortDescription: Quick blowing of leaves and light debris from lawns and hardscapes.
services.longDescription: A fast, budget-friendly option to clear leaves from your lawn, driveway, patio, and walkways. Pair with debris removal add-ons for haul-away service.
